issue.message: Missing permissions required by UsageStatsManager.queryUsageStats: android.permission.PACKAGE_USAGE_STATS
Don't include `android.R` here; use a fully qualified name for each usage instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead

Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Reflective access to getIntent, which is not part of the public SDK and therefore likely to change in future Android releases
Using internal inset dimension resource `status_bar_height` is not supported
Call requires API level 33 (current min is 30): `android.content.Intent#getParcelableExtra`
Accessing internal APIs via reflection is not supported and may not work on all devices or in the future
Accessing internal APIs via reflection is not supported and may not work on all devices or in the future

Reflective access to mTarget will throw an exception when targeting API 37 and above

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html
Most apps don't need access to high sensor sampling rate.
A newer version of androidx.compose.material3:material3 than 1.5.0-alpha22 is available: 1.5.0-alpha23
A newer version of com.github.skydoves:colorpicker-compose than 1.1.2 is available: 1.2.0
Composable functions that return Unit should start with an uppercase letter
Modifier factory functions must use the receiver Modifier instance
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be named modifier
Modifier parameter should be named modifier

Modifier parameter should be named modifier
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter

Switch statement on an `int` with known associated constant missing case `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_ANNOUNCEMENT`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_ASSIST_READING_CONTEXT`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_GESTURE_DETECTION_END`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_GESTURE_DETECTION_START`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_NOTIFICATION_STATE_CHANGED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_SPEECH_STATE_CHANGE`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_TOUCH_EXPLORATION_GESTURE_END`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_TOUCH_EXPLORATION_GESTURE_START`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_TOUCH_INTERACTION_END`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_TOUCH_INTERACTION_START`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_ACCESSIBILITY_FOCUSED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_ACCESSIBILITY_FOCUS_CLEARED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_CLICKED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_CONTEXT_CLICKED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_HOVER_ENTER`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_HOVER_EXIT`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_LONG_CLICKED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_SCROLLED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_SELECTED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_TARGETED_BY_SCROLL`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_TEXT_SELECTION_CHANGED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_TEXT_TRAVERSED_AT_MOVEMENT_GRANULARITY`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_WINDOW_CONTENT_CHANGED`

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

issue.errorLine1: <string name="permission_notification_desc">需要通知权限以保持后台服务运行</string>
<string name="live_preview_hint">拖动触发区/索引相关滑块时会实时预览布局；其余时间可直接在屏幕边缘试用手势</string>
<string name="side_gestures_preview_hint">拖动触钮或滑动距离滑块时会实时预览：橙色为触发区，内圈为短距阈值，外圈为长距阈值；白色箭头为已配置手势的滑动提示动画；蓝色为返回拦截区</string>
<string name="align_handles_desc">仅将本组触钮与对侧同组保持相同位置</string>
<string name="intercept_system_back_desc">使用系统接口拦截，可能有兼容性问题</string>
<string name="free_window_enabled_desc">开启后可使用小窗及相关启动策略</string>
<string name="free_window_portrait_only_hint">本应用仅支持竖屏，小窗预览与启动均按竖屏计算</string>
<string name="free_window_mode_hint">各厂商通过 ActivityOptions 的 windowingMode 启动小窗，模式值不同；Flyme 为 11，HyperOS 为 5 等。若无效请在对应系统设置中开启小窗/自由窗口。</string>
<string name="free_window_mode_originos_desc">适用于 OriginOS 等支持小窗分享的系统</string>
<string name="launch_policy_always_free_window_desc">松开图标后直接以小窗打开</string>
<string name="launch_policy_fullscreen_long_press_free_window_desc">默认全屏；在图标上按住达到设定时间后松开，以小窗打开</string>
<string name="launch_policy_free_window_long_press_fullscreen_desc">默认小窗；在图标上按住达到设定时间后松开，以全屏打开</string>
<string name="long_press_launch_duration_desc">在应用图标上按住达到该时间后，松开将使用另一种打开方式</string>
<string name="excluded_apps_entry_desc">在这些应用中不显示边缘触发区</string>
<string name="shortcut_gestures_entry_desc">从边缘快速向内滑动，直接打开指定应用</string>
<string name="shortcut_gestures_entry_count">已配置 %1$d 条快捷手势</string>
<string name="shortcut_gestures_pick_left">选择左边缘短滑要打开的应用</string>
<string name="shortcut_gestures_pick_right">选择右边缘短滑要打开的应用</string>
<string name="accessibility_service_desc">开启后才能使用边缘手势与边栏面板，并执行返回、主屏幕、多任务等系统手势；未授权 Shizuku 时也可用于边缘单击穿透。</string>
<string name="side_gestures_entry_desc">配置短/长距离滑动手势动作</string>
<string name="gesture_action_adjust_volume_desc">滑动时显示音量指示条并调节音量</string>
<string name="gesture_action_adjust_brightness_desc">滑动时显示亮度指示条并调节亮度</string>
<string name="gesture_action_screen_record_permission">需要“显示在其他应用上层”权限</string>
<string name="media_notification_listener_name">通知监听（媒体会话与历史记录）</string>
<string name="gesture_hint_enabled_desc">在设置预览和滑动过程中显示方向引导</string>
<string name="gesture_hint_style_pixel_back_desc">Pixel 风格胶囊返回动画，紧贴手指并弹性释放</string>
<string name="animation_style_select_desc">选择边缘手势提示的动画样式</string>
<string name="animation_style_select_hint">选中样式后，可点齿轮进入详细配色与形状设置。</string>
<string name="animation_style_color_hex_invalid">请输入有效的十六进制颜色值</string>
<string name="animation_style_reserved_bounds_hint">防止超出屏幕，需要居中请关闭</string>
<string name="permission_shizuku_desc">授权后可划掉多任务卡片、关闭应用，以及通过 shell 实现边缘单击穿透（推荐）。</string>
<string name="quick_launcher_editor_desc">与悬浮窗面板相同的侧栏布局：+ 添加、− 编辑；编辑模式下可拖动排序或点红标删除。</string>
<string name="quick_launcher_add_shortcut_desc">选择应用内的快捷方式（如扫码、付款码）</string>
<string name="quick_launcher_add_folder_desc">将多个应用收纳到一个文件夹</string>
<string name="quick_launcher_folder_edit_desc">向文件夹中添加或移除应用</string>
<string name="quick_launcher_folder_empty">文件夹为空，从下方列表添加应用</string>
<string name="quick_launcher_no_shortcuts_catalog">未找到已注册的系统快捷方式</string>
<string name="quick_launcher_scan_system_xml">正在读取系统快捷方式数据…</string>
<string name="quick_launcher_scan_dumpsys">正在通过 Shizuku 获取快捷方式…</string>
<string name="quick_launcher_add_overlay_hint">点返回关闭 · 底部系统手势仍可用</string>
<string name="task_switcher_no_shizuku">需要 Shizuku 权限以显示后台任务</string>
<string name="widget_panel_settings_desc">配置手势「小组件弹出窗口」中显示的系统小组件。点击空格子从列表中选择，长按已添加的小组件可移除。</string>
<string name="widget_panel_entry_desc">配置弹出窗口中的系统小组件</string>
<string name="widget_panel_entry_summary">已添加 %1$d 个小组件 · %2$d 页</string>
<string name="widget_panel_blur_desc">Android 12+ 在面板后方显示毛玻璃效果</string>
<string name="shell_panel_subtitle">通过 Shizuku 执行 shell 命令并查看输出</string>
<string name="shell_panel_entry_desc">保存常用 shell 命令，一键执行</string>
<string name="shell_panel_force_adb">将 root 权限降低至 adb</string>
<string name="shell_panel_empty_hint">点击右下角 + 添加命令。点击卡片执行，长按编辑或删除。</string>
<string name="shell_panel_edit_hint">支持管道与重定向，例如：dumpsys connectivity | grep wlan0</string>
<string name="shell_panel_run_failed">执行失败，请确认 Shizuku 已授权且命令有效</string>
<string name="shell_panel_execute_timeout">执行超时。请重启 Shizuku 后重试，或检查命令是否会长时间阻塞。</string>
<string name="shell_panel_overlay_empty">暂无命令，点击下方「添加命令」</string>
<string name="shell_panel_result_hint">点击关闭 · 长按复制输出</string>
<string name="shell_panel_result_hint_scroll">滑动查看 · 点击关闭 · 长按复制</string>
<string name="shell_panel_root_unavailable_message">当前设备未授予 Root，或 su 不可用。Root 模式下命令可能失败，是否仍要切换？</string>
<string name="shell_panel_root_confirm_message">已检测到可用 Root 权限。Root 模式下命令将以 su 执行，是否切换？</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("columns"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("notifications"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("notifications"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("apps"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("official"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="otp_rules_official_hint">Loaded %1$d official rules from smscode-rules. Tap refresh for the latest.</string>

issue.message: Permission exists without corresponding hardware `<uses-feature android:name="android.hardware.camera" android:required="false" />` tag
A `<queries>` declaration should generally be used instead of QUERY_ALL_PACKAGES; see https://g.co/dev/packagevisibility for details
Avoid object allocations during draw/layout operations (preallocate and reuse instead)
issue.errorLine1: val rect = RectF(left, top, right, bottom)

issue.message: Avoid object allocations during draw/layout operations (preallocate and reuse instead)
issue.errorLine1: canvas.drawRoundRect(RectF(left.toFloat(), top.toFloat(), right.toFloat(), bottom.toFloat()), cornerRadius, cornerRadius, dragPreviewPaint)

issue.message: Avoid object allocations during draw/layout operations (preallocate and reuse instead)
issue.errorLine1: val rect = RectF(left.toFloat(), top.toFloat(), (left + barWidth).toFloat(), (top + barHeight).toFloat())

issue.message: Provide a timeout when requesting a wakelock with `PowerManager.Wakelock.acquire(long timeout)`. This will ensure the OS will cleanup any wakelocks that last longer than you intend, and will save your user's battery.
This `ParcelFileDescriptor` should be freed up after use with `#close()`

issue.errorLine1: if (icon == null || Build.VERSION.SDK_INT < Build.VERSION_CODES.M) return null

issue.message: Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `DanmakuOverlayWindow` which has field `overlayContext` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields; this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields; this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `ActionExecutor` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak

issue.errorLine1: override fun onTouchEvent(event: MotionEvent): Boolean = touchHandler(event)

issue.message: `onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
Custom view ``ResizeHandleView`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`ResizeTouchListener#onTouch` should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
issue.errorLine1: override fun onTouch(v: View, event: MotionEvent): Boolean {
